<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="1JMdk4O7iEE0aOkstjtG" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-349" dy="-93" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#1a237e;" value="<b>模糊查询对比：LIKE 'Zhang%' vs LIKE '%Zhang'</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="520" x="80" y="8" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontColor=#1B5E20;rounded=1;" value="<b>✅ LIKE 'Zhang%' → 走索引</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="240" x="30" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="right_title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;fontColor=#B71C1C;rounded=1;" value="<b>❌ LIKE '%Zhang' → 全表扫描</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="260" x="360" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="good_tree" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1976D2;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1565C0;" value="<b>name B+树（前缀有序）</b><br>A→B→C→...→Z" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="150" x="80" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="good_range" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1B5E20;" value="<b>Zhang 开头的数据</b><br>连续排在一起<br>定位到第一条 Zhang<br>沿链表扫描即可" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="170" x="60" y="155" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bad_tree" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=10;fontColor=#B71C1C;" value="<b>name B+树（倒序？）</b><br>A→B→C→...→Z" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="160" x="410" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bad_explain" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=10;fontColor=#B71C1C;" value="<b>以 Zhang 结尾的数据</b><br>分散在整个树中<br>Aang, Bang, ..., Zang<br>每条都可能命中<br>必须扫全部叶子" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="390" y="155" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cross" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#C62828;" value="✗
✗
